title: FCDO Afghanistan Official Development Assistance results, April 2024 to March 2025
body: "FCDO Afghanistan results achieved in the period April 2024 to March 2025, through bilateral Official Development Assistance (ODA) programming.   The publication provides:   a factsheet presenting a snapshot of headline results a methodology document explaining the definitions of the result indicators, quality assurance processes and calculation steps   Results are figures that have been collated from a set of programmes to provide an indication of FCDO’s ODA-funded activity in Afghanistan. Results are defined as the outputs, outcomes or impacts of development interventions. The results in this publication are outputs describing the support and services which result from Afghanistan ODA programmes.  "
